commentaries.author: Aquinas Study Bible
commentaries.content: raging waves etc.: The words of Jude here about these men are to be understood metaphorically. (Andreas of Caesarea)

commentaries.author: Clement Of Alexandria
commentaries.content:
"Waves of a raging sea": By these words he signifies the life of the Gentiles, whose end is abominable ambition.
"Wandering stars,"— that is, he means those who err and are apostates are of that kind of stars which fell from the seats of the angels— to whom, for their apostasy, the blackness of darkness is reserved for ever.

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
